## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content guidelines and strategy for creating high-quality, SEO-optimized blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Incorporate multiple related keywords (1 primary, 2-3 secondary) into content outlines for better rankings](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Aim for a blend of informative yet conversational tone, avoiding overly simplistic or overly embellished writing](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Leverage AI image generation tools like Midjourney for original visuals](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Categorize content by funnel stage (top/middle/bottom) and user needs/pain points for strategic planning](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Content Checklist

  - #### SEO Guidelines
    
      - [Target 1 primary keyword + 3-6 secondary keywords](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [4-6% keyword density](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Include target keyword in first sentence](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [H1 title: 55-70 chars, start with keyword if possible](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Use CoSchedule Headline Analyzer tool](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [5-10 internal links, relevant anchor text](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [2-5 external authority links](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Optimize images (file names, alt text, original vs stock)](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Compelling meta description with call-to-action](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

  - #### Writing Guidelines
    
      - [Max 3-4 line paragraphs for scannability](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Use Hemingway app to target \~7th grade reading level](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [H2/H3 header guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Brand Voice

  - [Personable, straightforward, tenacious tone that adapts to situation](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Follow brand style guide (e.g. sentence case, Oxford commas)](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Aim for informative yet conversational voice, avoid overly simplistic or embellished](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Content Strategy/Taxonomy

  - [Categorize by funnel stage (top/middle/bottom/sales enablement/user engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Map to user needs/pain points](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Top funnel = awareness (e.g. "what is payroll?")](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Middle funnel = evaluation (e.g. "payroll tools comparison")](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Bottom funnel = product-specific (e.g. "is HomeBase payroll right for me?")](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share SEO checklist, brand guide, example pieces reflecting ideal voice](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Incorporate guidelines into prompts/templates](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Categorize keywords/content by funnel stage and user needs](https://fathom.video/share/ekEpbFfNyyrXhAU4Z2d5iPjEfbYNMyup?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
